languages.primary_rationale: B2B in Dubai defaults to English. Decision-makers and finance/ops teams operate in English across the GCC. Arabic is government-facing; ar-AE optional v2.

weekend_note: UAE moved to Sat-Sun weekend in Jan 2022; Friday is a half-day in government but the private B2B sector now treats Mon-Fri as the work week.
regional_trust_signals_for_niche: Zoho Authorised Partner badge (level: Advanced / Premium / Authorised Training — display whichever is held)
Client logos (UAE SMEs they have implemented for)
DED (Department of Economic Development) trade license number (LLC entity)
VAT registration number (TRN) — signals real FTA-registered business; reassures finance buyers
Knowledge of UAE VAT (5%), Corporate Tax (9% from Jun 2023), e-invoicing readiness — VERY important hooks for Zoho Books buyers
ESR / UBO / AML compliance familiarity — bonus for finance audience
DIFC / ADGM client experience (if any) — premium signal

legal_compliance.data_protection: UAE Federal Decree-Law No. 45 of 2021 (PDPL) + DIFC Data Protection Law DIFC DPL 5/2020 if serving DIFC clients
legal_compliance.cookie_consent: PDPL-aligned consent banner required; opt-in for non-essential cookies. Plain English notice + Arabic link recommended.
legal_compliance.marketing_email: PDPL consent for marketing emails; double opt-in recommended for B2B drip
legal_compliance.company_info_on_site: LLC trade license number + VAT TRN should appear in footer (UAE business etiquette + builds trust)
legal_compliance.claims_to_avoid: Avoid '#1', 'guaranteed', or comparative claims naming competitors — UAE consumer protection guidance is conservative; B2B audiences are also skeptical of superlatives

common_b2b_payment_methods_in_uae: Cheque (still very common in UAE for invoicing)
Credit card (less common B2B; common for training-program purchases)
Stripe / PayTabs / Telr for online (training payments)

communication_channel_preferences_uae_b2.primary_rationale: WhatsApp is the de-facto B2B contact channel across the GCC. Almost every UAE SME founder/CFO/Ops manager replies on WhatsApp faster than email. WhatsApp click-to-chat with pre-filled message is essential.
communication_channel_preferences_uae_b2.linkedin_inmail: useful for cold outreach, low for inbound

regional_idioms_and_spelling.currency_written: AED before number ('AED 5,000') or 'Dh 5,000' in casual copy; avoid 'dirhams' in formal B2B
phrases_native_to_uae_b2b: InshaAllah used informally — avoid in marketing copy
'Free zone' / 'mainland' are common qualifiers when discussing client setup
'TRN' (Tax Registration Number) and 'VAT' are universally understood
Address language: 'office number, building name, street name, area, Dubai'
